title: Malaysian Crumble Cake
description: A moist and flavorful cake with a crunchy crumble topping, inspired by Malaysian flavors.
instructions: Grease a 9-inch round cake pan and set aside.
In a medium bowl, whisk together the flour, sugar, and flaky sea salt.
In a large bowl, whisk together the butter, eggs, and Malaysian yeast extract.
Add the dry ingredients to the wet ingredients and mix until just combined.
Pour the batter into the prepared cake pan and smooth the top.
Make the crumble topping by combining the crumble mixture in a small bowl.
Sprinkle the crumble topping evenly over the cake batter.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
Remove from the oven and let cool in the pan for 5 minutes before transferring to a wire rack to cool completely.
Serve warm or at room temperature.
